description: Style NoteStylish to a T, these tights from adidas are engineered with climacool technology and designed to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The comfortable waistband sits snugly, offering a flattering Fit. Team it with performance t-shirts and sports shoes for that smart, sporty lookProduct DetailsBlue tights with an elasticated waistband, has a trim below the waistband on the front and back, mesh panels on the back and sides below the knee to the hems, a band on the hems and branding printed below the waistband on the leftMaterial and Care90% polyester and 10% lycraMachine wash with like colours below 40 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach, soak or tumble dryDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
